result.full_text: Hi, it's Maren, the AI assistant of Brookville Animal Hospital on a recorded line. I can help with scheduling, taking a message, or support in case of an emergency. I need to make an appointment for a puppy. I can help with that. What is the reason for the visit for your puppy? They check up. Thanks for letting me know. Has your puppy been having any symptoms, or is this just a routine wellness visit? Routine wellness. Thank you. Have you been to our practice before, or would this be your first visit with us? Been there before. Thanks for letting me know. What is your puppy's name? name? Trigger. Thank you. I will need to gather a bit more information before scheduling. Is Trigger a boy or a girl? Boy. Thank you. Just to confirm, I was asking if Trigger is a boy or a girl. Could you let me know? Yes, it's a boy. Thank you. Do you have a doctor preference for Trigger's visit, or would you like the first available appointment? First available. Give me a moment while I check the next available wellness appointment for Trigger. The next available wellness appointment is tomorrow, Tuesday at 2.30 p.m. with Drive Emily Warner. Would you like to book that for Trigger? You don't have anything for today? I checked our schedule for today, but unfortunately there are no wellness appointment slots available. Would you like to book the appointment for tomorrow at 2.30pm? I'll call you back. Of course. Please feel free to call back whenever you are ready, and I will be happy to help book Trigger's appointment. Is there anything else I can help with right now? No. Thank you for calling. Have a great day. Bye.
